description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser maximize metamagic rod 14,000 gp Maximize metamagic rod 54,000 gp Greater maximize metamagic rod 121,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are maximized as though using the Maximize Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Maximize Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser maximize metamagic rod 7,000 gp Maximize metamagic rod 27,000 gp Greater maximize metamagic rod 60,750 gp
